confirmed_mismatches.details: Uses full 0..1 Wisp atlas for both shell and core; PARTICLES constant points to Minecraft and is unused; no 4x4/16x1 frame UV; size and additive blend differ from TC4 RenderWisp.
Uses vanilla minecraft furnace GUI instead of TC4 textures/gui/gui_alchemyfurnace.png and original gauge UV/coordinates.

limitations: No original 1.7.10 runtime screenshots were supplied or generated.
TC4 1.7.10 has no JSON model corpus for direct JSON-to-JSON UV comparison.
Static source/resource checks do not prove final GPU output.
